title: Harness SKILL.md frontmatter
description: Contract for the YAML frontmatter of every SKILL.md. Required: name + description. Optional fields are coverage filled by the frontmatter rollout; check_skill_structure enforces required-present + known-field types (advisory), never penalizes an absent optional field.

name.description: Skill id, hs:-prefixed and matching the directory, e.g. hs:cook or hs:brainstorm. For a plugin skill the invocation follows this frontmatter name (verified: bare name would invoke bare /cook, not /hs:cook), so keep the hs: prefix. Ownership stays location-based (see catalog.py), which also folds a legacy bare name for back-compat.

description.description: One-line routing description. Action verb + what + 'Use when/for ...' trigger.

when_to_use.description: Longer trigger guidance beyond the one-line description.

argument-hint.description: CLI-style hint of the skill's arguments, e.g. "<plan-path> [--parallel]".

allowed-tools.description: Tools the skill may use; array or comma string.

injectable.description: True if a second engine (the gemini partner lane) can follow this skill as advisory methodology.

paths.description: Glob(s) that bind auto-activation to a file-type context; array of globs or a comma string.

disable-model-invocation.description: True stops Claude from auto-loading the skill; manual /name invocation only.
